title: Sugar Bytes OBSCURIUM Trailer
description:
All sounds in the video were made with Obscurium.

Download Demo here:
http://www.sugar-bytes.de/content/products/Obscurium/index.php?lang=en

Obscurium is the new generative synthesizer from Sugar Bytes.

Obscurium generates scales, chords, arpeggios and combines these with FM and Analog Synthesis or any VST plugin.

Create unbelievable sound textures, chord sequences or even drums. The sound is always organic, mysterious and very clear.

Tutorials by the great Tom Cosm:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hWJAfd80J68&list=PLTnh-zr9cXzDqCJaKDeYjnAvDr3oTuJZy
